word: G3679 - ὀνειδίζω - oneidízō - on-i-did'-zo - Cast in teeth

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὀνειδέζω

- Transliteration: oneidizo

- Phonetic: on-i-did'-zo

- Definition:

1. to reproach, upbraid, revile

a. of deserved reproach

b. of undeserved reproach, to revile

c. to upbraid, cast (favours received) in one's teeth

- Origin: from G3681

- TDNT entry: 08:59,7

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G3681; to defame that is rail at chide taunt: - cast in teeth (suffer) reproach revile upbraid.
